habits.label: Your prompts are often very short
habits.coaching: Short prompts often show up alongside more back-and-forth. A sentence of context usually gets a better first answer.

habits.label: You rarely push back on the AI
habits.coaching: Sessions with no pushback often drift. Questioning output when something looks off tends to land better results.

habits.label: You plan before big changes
habits.coaching: Setting up before diving in tends to show up alongside finishing more of what you start.

habits.label: You check your work before calling it done
habits.coaching: Verifying as you go tends to show up alongside fewer surprises later.

habits.label: You run work in parallel
habits.coaching: Delegating sub-tasks in parallel often shows up alongside getting more done per session.
